#!/bin/bash

SKILLS_DIRS=(
  "/c/Users/kas41/.agents/skills"
  "/c/Users/kas41/.claude/skills"
)

declare -A seen
total=0
mvs_pass=0
mvs_fail=0

echo "| Skill | Score | validate.sh | Examples | Troubleshooting | See Also | references/ | Issues |"
echo "|-------|-------|-------------|----------|-----------------|----------|-------------|--------|"

for base_dir in "${SKILLS_DIRS[@]}"; do
  for skill_dir in "$base_dir"/*/; do
    skill=$(basename "$skill_dir")
    
    # Skip duplicates
    if [ "${seen[$skill]}" == "1" ]; then
      continue
    fi
    seen[$skill]=1
    total=$((total+1))
    
    md="$skill_dir/SKILL.md"
    [ -f "$md" ] || continue
    
    score=0
    notes=""
    
    # Check validate.sh
    validate="$skill_dir/scripts/validate.sh"
    if [ -f "$validate" ]; then
      if bash "$validate" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        validate_status="âœ…"
        score=$((score+1))
      else
        validate_status="â�Œ"
        notes="$notes validate-fail"
      fi
    else
      validate_status="âš ï¸�"
      notes="$notes validate-missing"
    fi
    
    # Check Examples
    if grep -q "^## Examples" "$md"; then
      examples_status="âœ…"
      score=$((score+1))
    else
      examples_status="â�Œ"
      notes="$notes NO-Examples"
    fi
    
    # Check Troubleshooting
    if grep -q "^## Troubleshooting" "$md"; then
      troubleshooting_status="âœ…"
      score=$((score+1))
    else
      troubleshooting_status="â�Œ"
      notes="$notes NO-Troubleshooting"
    fi
    
    # Check See Also
    if grep -q "^## See Also" "$md"; then
      seealso_status="âœ…"
      score=$((score+1))
    else
      seealso_status="â�Œ"
      notes="$notes NO-SeeAlso"
    fi
    
    # Check references/
    refs_count=$(ls "$skill_dir/references/" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
    if [ "$refs_count" -gt 0 ]; then
      refs_status="âœ…"
      score=$((score+1))
    else
      refs_status="â�Œ"
      notes="$notes NO-references"
    fi
    
    # Check for brew install (Windows compatibility)
    if grep -q "brew install" "$md" 2>/dev/null; then
      notes="$notes brew-incompatible"
    fi
    
    # Count MVS compliance
    if [ "$score" -ge 3 ]; then
      mvs_pass=$((mvs_pass+1))
    else
      mvs_fail=$((mvs_fail+1))
    fi
    
    # Clean up notes
    notes=$(echo "$notes" | xargs)
    [ -z "$notes" ] && notes="â€”"
    
    echo "| $skill | $score/5 | $validate_status | $examples_status | $troubleshooting_status | $seealso_status | $refs_status | $notes |"
  done
done

echo ""
echo "## Summary"
echo "- **Total skills:** $total"
echo "- **MVS compliant (â‰¥3/5):** $mvs_pass"
echo "- **Below MVS (<3/5):** $mvs_fail"
echo "- **Compliance rate:** $(( mvs_pass * 100 / total ))%"
EOF

bash /tmp/audit_skills.sh

cat > /tmp/full_audit.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

SKILLS_DIRS=(
  "/c/Users/kas41/.agents/skills"
  "/c/Users/kas41/.claude/skills"
)

declare -A seen
declare -a all_skills
total=0
mvs_pass=0
mvs_fail=0
declare -a critical_skills
declare -a below_mvs_skills

for base_dir in "${SKILLS_DIRS[@]}"; do
  for skill_dir in "$base_dir"/*/; do
    skill=$(basename "$skill_dir")
    
    if [ "${seen[$skill]}" == "1" ]; then
      continue
    fi
    seen[$skill]=1
    all_skills+=("$skill:$skill_dir")
    total=$((total+1))
  done
done

# Sort skills
IFS=$'\n' sorted_skills=($(printf '%s\n' "${all_skills[@]}" | sort))
unset IFS

for skill_pair in "${sorted_skills[@]}"; do
  IFS=':' read -r skill skill_dir <<< "$skill_pair"
  
  md="$skill_dir/SKILL.md"
  [ -f "$md" ] || continue
  
  score=0
  issues=()
  
  # Check validate.sh
  validate="$skill_dir/scripts/validate.sh"
  if [ ! -f "$validate" ]; then
    issues+=("validate-missing")
  elif ! bash "$validate" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
    issues+=("validate-fail")
  else
    score=$((score+1))
  fi
  
  # Check Examples
  if grep -q "^## Examples" "$md"; then
    score=$((score+1))
  else
    issues+=("NO-Examples")
  fi
  
  # Check Troubleshooting
  if grep -q "^## Troubleshooting" "$md"; then
    score=$((score+1))
  else
    issues+=("NO-Troubleshooting")
  fi
  
  # Check See Also
  if grep -q "^## See Also" "$md"; then
    score=$((score+1))
  else
    issues+=("NO-SeeAlso")
  fi
  
  # Check references/
  refs_count=$(ls "$skill_dir/references/" 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  if [ "$refs_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    score=$((score+1))
  else
    issues+=("NO-references")
  fi
  
  # Check for brew install
  if grep -q "brew install" "$md" 2>/dev/null; then
    issues+=("brew-incompatible")
  fi
  
  # Categorize
  if [ "$score" -lt 2 ]; then
    critical_skills+=("$skill:$score")
  elif [ "$score" -lt 3 ]; then
    below_mvs_skills+=("$skill:$score")
  fi
  
  if [ "$score" -ge 3 ]; then
    mvs_pass=$((mvs_pass+1))
  else
    mvs_fail=$((mvs_fail+1))
  fi
done

echo "# Skill Health Report - $(date +%Y-%m-%d)"
echo ""
echo "## Summary"
echo "- **Total skills:** $total"
echo "- **MVS compliant (â‰¥3/5):** $mvs_pass"
echo "- **Below MVS (<3/5):** $mvs_fail"
echo "- **Compliance rate:** $(( mvs_pass * 100 / total ))%"
echo ""
echo "## Critical Issues (0-1/5)"
echo ""
for skill_info in "${critical_skills[@]}"; do
  IFS=':' read -r skill score <<< "$skill_info"
  echo "- **$skill** ($score/5) â€” Missing core MVS requirements"
done
echo ""
echo "## Below MVS (2/5)"
echo ""
for skill_info in "${below_mvs_skills[@]}"; do
  IFS=':' read -r skill score <<< "$skill_info"
  echo "- **$skill** ($score/5) â€” Missing one or more core components"
done
EOF

bash /tmp/full_audit.sh

cd /c/Users/kas41/chromatic-harness-v2 && git add -A && git commit -m "audit: complete skill health report + fix security-suite validate.sh

- Audited all 54 skills across .agents/skills and .claude/skills
- Generated comprehensive health report: 19% MVS compliance (10/54 skills)
- Critical issues: 7 empty package-* skills (0/5), 37 missing validate.sh
- Fixed security-suite path conversion bug in validate.sh (Windows cygpath handling)
- Identified architecture issues: duplicate skills, missing MVS template
- Report: .agents/audit/20260528-skill-health.md with remediation roadmap"
